business.name: National Science & Technology Park (NSTP)
business.description: NSTP - National Science and Technology Park

ai.tagline: Innovation et collaboration pour l'avenir technologique
ai.hero_subtitle: Un espace dédié à l'innovation scientifique et technologique, favorisant la collaboration entre entreprises et chercheurs.
ai.about_paragraph: Le National Science & Technology Park (NSTP) est un écosystème dynamique conçu pour soutenir l'innovation et la recherche. Situé à Islamabad, il offre des infrastructures modernes et des ressources pour les entreprises technologiques et les startups.
ai.about_story_left: Le National Science & Technology Park (NSTP) est un écosystème dynamique conçu pour soutenir l'innovation et la recherche. Situé
ai.about_story_right: à Islamabad, il offre des infrastructures modernes et des ressources pour les entreprises technologiques et les startups.
ai.seo_title: National Science & Technology Park - Innovons ensemble
ai.seo_description: Découvrez le National Science & Technology Park, un hub d'innovation à Islamabad, Pakistan, dédié aux entreprises technologiques.

reviews.text: The campus in Sector H-12 Islamabad was initiated in 2008. The campus is spread over 800 acres. Includes all sports facilities. Cricket, hockey football  Besides NUST Headquarters, the schools and institutes that were relocated to this campus include School of Civil and Environmental Engineering, School of Mechanical and Manufacturing Engineering, School of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science, School of Chemical and Materials Engineering, Research Center for Modeling and Simulation, School of Natural Sciences (formerly known as Center for Advanced Mathematics and Physics), Atta-ur-Rehman School of Applied Bio-sciences, School of Art Design and Architecture, NUST Business School, School of Social Sciences and Humanities, Professional Development Center, Technology Incubation Center, Marketing and Industrial Relations Organization, NUST Publishing and NUST Outreach and Talent Hunt Initiative. Well maintained by the authorities. Fully recommend for the students to get visionary education in the best environment.
Loved the place, great for working and easily accessible for commuting 😀 …

Great, clean, plenty of parking.
Well equipped
This building gives a true representation of the NUST. Adorable facade, interior, and architecture.

A wonderful multi-storey building for technological innovation, development and colleboration. They environment is so comfortable that it doesn't allow one to leave. There are several offices and setups of various national and international companies doing collaborative research projects. There is a cental projects display area on the ground floor where innovative and research projects/products are displayed for the visitors. I loved visiting this place. The visit was arranged through LearnOBots team leader, thanks to him.
National science and technology park located in national university of science and technology h12 campus
Pretty good place for finding opportunities

Good place for research based startups, otherwise not feasibile for startups who require frequent client visits.
Although Building is new, it's clean and tidy, power management is good, Air conditioning is excellent.
Services are good but again not for startups which have requirement of daily visitors as the visitors will be annoyed by having to first stand in queue, submit their ID cards then come and have to collect it afterwards. It sounds easy, but it's hefty.
First ever technology park in Pakistan which encourages new business ideas.

NSTP - It is incubation centre with cooperative staff. It has a workable building [getting alos an other buiding nearby in coming month]It is a space for new age entrepreneurs and young minds to transform their innovative ideas into viable business propositions. The primary vision is to facilitate a platform for a budding entrepreneur to start a business venture with minimum risks.
A great ecosystem, first of its kind, in Pakistan. Follows the typical concept of a STP by bringing together industry an

Neat and clean peaceful environment.
Managment is very good at all
A great initiative. Although the price per square ft of rental space is excessively high. It should be reduced so more c
